text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
My mission for the day... is complete. Now, to
return to my routine...

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Kris S. Are you not greater than the
monistic urge to return to your source?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: I haven't particularly explored other options.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Then listen now to your ego's whispers. Let your
inner persona crash the facade, and act upon
your heart's desires.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any strong desires right now. At
most... I suppose I'm thirsty.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Good, good. Let the tides of élan vital overwhelm
your conscience. Tell me—what does your psyche
demand?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Oddly, I'm in the mood for sparkling water. I'll
head to the vending machine.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
The vending machine cannot assuage your body's
screams for salvation! It yearns not for fleeting
plastic-entombed relief, but a more lasting
elysium! Let us drink in the hall of heroes, dear
einheri!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: I see now. You mean to say you're also thirsty.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Mmwahahaha! That is but a trivial detail! You
needn't philosophize on my every word! Does the
nectar not flow sweet regardless?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
...Are you done? Let's head over, then. To the
cafeteria.
